agent_raw: Defense wins. The missingness indicators in this credit risk model are submission-time features confirmed by timestamp audit — not post-decision leakage. The distinction between submission-time missingness (legitimate) and request-triggered or post-decision missingness (leakage) is clearly handled by the methods section and timestamp audit. The future-quarter holdout on the frozen model provides clean evaluation. The workflow dependence is a real scope limitation that is disclosed and does not invalidate the in-scope claim.
